model.name: Krea 2 Turbo Ostris Edit
model.description: Krea 2 Turbo with Ostris's reference-edit conditioning: Reference Images are described to the text encoder with 'Picture N' vision markers and their clean latents ride at the end of the sequence at t=0. On its own this mode does little - activate a Krea 2 edit LoRA trained with ai-toolkit's edit mode (such as Style Reference or Detail Enhancer, available as dedicated finetunes) to give it a function.

prompt: a woman walking her dog on a city street
